ValidationRule.description: If the "Extended Rent Period?" checkbox is NOT checked, Extended Rent Type value can only be Null
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: false /*AND(!Extended_Rent_Period__c, OR( Text(Extended_Rent_Type__c)=='Extended at Current Rent Rate', Text(Extended_Rent_Type__c)=='Extended at Holdover Rent Rate') )*/
ValidationRule.errorMessage: If the "Extended Rent Period?" checkbox is NOT checked, Extended Rent Type value can only be null.
